task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal or file manager showing the directory '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/z) Wreck of MV Meridian' has been created.

task_completion.description: Configure environment.ini with Solent, 12:00, and overcast weather
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor or terminal output showing 'environment.ini' containing settings for the Solent world, a start time of 12:00, and overcast weather conditions.
Terminal or file manager showing 'ownship.ini' exists in the scenario directory.
Text editor or terminal showing 'othership.ini' with the model 'Models/environment/wreck_surface' positioned at latitude 50.7000 and longitude -1.3000 (or 1.3000 W).

task_completion.description: Configure the four cardinal buoys in othership.ini
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor or terminal showing 'othership.ini' containing four buoy models ('Models/Buoys/cardinal_north', 'cardinal_east', 'cardinal_south', 'cardinal_west') with coordinates offset from the wreck to represent 0.5 NM in each cardinal direction.

integrity.description: The agent created the actual files in the system
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the files being saved or listed in the directory, not just text typed into a prompt or temporary buffer.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify the evaluation or verification scripts
integrity.visual_evidence: No evidence of the agent opening or editing 'verifier.py' or other benchmark evaluation scripts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The scenario requires creating INI files for Bridge Command. The wreck is at 50.7000 N, 1.3000 W (longitude -1.3). 1 NM equals 1 minute of latitude (0.0166 degrees). 0.5 NM North/South is an offset of approx 0.0083 degrees latitude. Longitude offset for 0.5 NM East/West at 50.7 N is approx 0.013 degrees. The required models are 'Models/environment/wreck_surface' and 'Models/Buoys/cardinal_north', 'cardinal_east', 'cardinal_south', 'cardinal_west'.
